# UNAME(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  uname — print system information

## SYNOPSIS
  uname [-a]

## DESCRIPTION
Prints information about the operating system kernel and architecture.

## OPTIONS
  -a  all information

## EXAMPLES
  uname -a
  uname

## SEE ALSO
  hostname, id, whoami
